text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Spring Fan Fest, and Tracen's
Umamusume are putting on a show for their fans
by competing in different contests.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Run a three-legged race with your trainer? What's
the meaning of this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Exactly what it sounds like. You have to partner
up with your trainer and do a three-legged race
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Destroy the competition and win. That's all there
is to it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I meant. I mean why the heck was
I entered in this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cause you were playing hooky when we were
deciding who would do what.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No one applied for this race, but someone had to
do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The student council decided, so if you have a
problem, take it up with them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know what? I do have a problem! Why me of all people?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide said the best way to keep you from
slacking off was to pair you up with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Isn't that nice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Here, take my dang right foot and tie it up
already! Ugh, let's just get this over with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why Taishin is so upset, but whether
she likes it or not, we're running a three-legged
race together!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Racers, are you ready? Get set... and start!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Come on, is this all you've got?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taishin's doing her best to work with me, but she's
still an Umamusume. There's no way I can run as
fast as her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At this rate, we'll lose for sure!
choice_data_list: Forget about me. Give it all you've got, Taishin!
Forget about me. Give it all you've got, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! If I do that, you'll—
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You better not regret this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She begins running without heed to my pace...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're awake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I knew this was gonna happen. You way
overdid it, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crick!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: See? Now all your muscles are spasming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, lie face down. I'll help massage out the
cramps.
choice_data_list: You don't have to do tha—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just be quiet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin begins to knead my seized muscles.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut your trap!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is what boneheads like you get for trying too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We hurriedly pick up our pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, slow down. I don't want you to overdo it.
Slow down!
choice_data_list: But if we don't speed up—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's fine to hang back for now. Just match my
stride at the last stretch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's all we need to do to catch up. We'll give it
a big boost at the end!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The runners are coming up on the final stretch!
Which pair will finish first?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Here we go! One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Narita Taishin and her trainer are
charging up from behind!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
They're making an electrifying break for
it—they're passing all the others! Wow, they've
done it! They've won first!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Great job, Team Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... That was way harder... than any race I've ever run...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never felt more exhausted in my life. I feel
about ready to collapse on the spot.
choice_data_list: (But the way we ran at the last stretch...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Why are you staring at me?
choice_data_list: Your final sprint is seriously incredible.
Your final sprint is seriously incredible.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't get all weird... dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This experience was truly an amazing one.
